name: Adrenaline
description: Adrenaline — AI-powered codebase exploration tool that explains and answers questions about any GitHub repository.

seo.title: Adrenaline — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Adrenaline: Adrenaline — AI-powered codebase exploration tool that explains and answers questions about any GitHub repository.

when_to_use: Exploring and understanding unfamiliar GitHub codebases quickly
Asking natural language questions about a repo's architecture
Onboarding to open-source projects with AI-guided code walkthrough
Debugging logic by querying how functions interact across files

pros: Explains unfamiliar GitHub repos without local cloning
Answers questions grounded in specific codebase context
Quick onboarding aid for open-source contributors
Handles repo-wide search beyond single-file context
cons: Quality drops on very large or poorly documented repos
Limited write/refactor capability versus full IDE agents
Depends on public GitHub access for most features
Smaller moat as Copilot Chat and Cursor cover same ground
review.verdict: Useful for exploring unknown repos, but narrow scope makes it a companion tool rather than a daily driver.
review.best_for: Developers onboarding to a new open-source repo or reviewing unfamiliar code
review.not_for: Teams needing full IDE integration, refactoring agents, or private enterprise repos

lock_in.reason: Operates on GitHub repos, no data import needed

developer_experience.reason: Web UI explains code; no SDK, limited extensibility
